description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux build in docker that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for debian and fedora. In each job, check out the repository, set up Docker Buildx, log in to GitHub Container Registry, build a Docker image using a Dockerfile specific to the matrix target, and push the image to ghcr.io with a tag including the target and current date.
